description: United States manufacturer direct availability target map for the current Production Beta rollout. This file documents source coverage, shipping scope and safe skips; it is not runtime configuration.
notes: Use RegionCode US for all future USA manufacturer-direct rows.
Do not run this file directly as production configuration.
Worldwide brands may preserve source currency and require a shipping note in the frontend response.

targets.marketNotes: Validated through the US Shopify-based manufacturer path.

Direct Manufacturer Stock Not Available. The USA site exposes model catalogue pages with dimensions plus Dealer Locator and Online Dealers links, but not purchasable manufacturer-direct inventory items. Use canonical catalogue and retailer inventory instead.
